creator: brd@FreeBSD.org
text:
It was fixed in r417716 and should be available after the next build run.

For 10.x amd64 it built fine in the most recent run: http://beefy6.nyi.freebsd.org/build.html?mastername=101amd64-default&build=417798

It takes a bit for the mirrors to sync, but try again and see if it is available now.
